productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Chicago Bulls NBA Red Jersey
description: Composition Red sleeveless jersey made of 100% polyester, has a round neckline, ribbed armholes, NBA logo appliqued on the left shoulder, embroidered branding on the right shoulder, printed branding on the front and player name printed on the back with the number Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Authentic Chicago Bulls merchandise from adidas for fans of Derrick Rose. A Basketball lovers' dream come true, this jersey is as comfortable as it looks. Perfect to showcase your team attachment, wear this with your training gear for a basketball game! Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
